scripts.build: npx pnpm install --ignore-scripts; chmod +x node_modules/.pnpm/esbuild@*/node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild 2>/dev/null; npx pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: npx pnpm run typecheck:libs && npx pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
